author: Samuel Vaillant
subject: refactor(createConnector): update subscriptions mechanism (algolia/react-instantsearch#1855)
body:
* refactor(createConnector): move subscription in didMount

* refactor(connectPoweredBy): do not rely on canRender

* chore(createConnector): add note about canRender usage

* fix(createConnector): does not throw an error on unmount before mount

* fix(createConnector): does not throw an error on dispatch after unmount

* test(createServer): use the correct number of calls

* fix(createConnector): uses the correct value for canRender in cWRP

* refactor(createConnector): use consitent names

* chore(createConnectors): connector -> connectors

Co-Authored-By: samouss <samuel.vllnt@gmail.com>
